Press Release

Empower Your Blockchain Experience

Discover the unparalleled capabilities that set Mazze apart.

Advanced Tech at the Core

Mazze leverages cutting-edge technology to offer unmatched blockchain solutions.

Financial Sector Transformation

Mazze offers robust and transparent solutions for cross-border transactions, reducing processing times and costs significantly. It enables small businesses to engage effortlessly in international trade, bypassing traditional banking complexities and fees.

Enhanced IoT & Real Estate

Mazze streamlines real estate transactions with its transparent ledger, increasing trust and accountability in property transfers. In the IoT domain, it enables secure and efficient data exchange, optimizing device interoperability and opening new avenues for smart technology applications.

Healthcare & Education

In healthcare, Mazze enhances patient data management by securely storing and sharing medical records, ensuring confidentiality and efficiency. In education, it enables the creation of tamper-proof academic credentials, combating qualification fraud and simplifying verification processes for employers.

Pioneering Technical Excellence

Mazze introduces groundbreaking technological advancements in blockchain infrastructure, emphasizing speed, security, and scalability.

High Throughput & Low Latency.

Mazze blockchain is engineered for exceptional performance, boasting a groundbreaking transaction processing speed of 40,000 transactions per second (TPS). This high throughput is achieved through the innovative use of Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) technology, which allows for parallel processing of transactions, significantly reducing the confirmation time. This technology not only ensures rapid transactions but also minimizes latency, achieving a remarkable 1-second finality. The architecture is designed to accommodate high-volume use cases such as micropayments, decentralized finance (DeFi), and enterprise solutions, ensuring that the Mazze blockchain remains efficient and scalable as the network grows.

EVM-compatible Smart Contracts

Mazze's smart contract platform is distinguished by the integration of Solidity as its primary programming language, specifically chosen to facilitate the migration of decentralized applications (dApps) from other blockchains, such as Ethereum. The alignment with Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) compatibility makes Solidity ideal for developing secure, efficient, and interoperable smart contracts. This choice enables a smooth transition for developers accustomed to EVM-compatible environments. Mazze's architecture, designed to support EVM compatibility, ensures versatility and adaptability in blockchain application development. A unique domain-specific language, optimized for EVM, simplifies and streamlines the development process.

Integrating ZK Proofs for Enhanced Privacy

In Phase D of the Mazze project, we're enhancing data privacy by integrating Zero-Knowledge (ZK) Proofs, a cryptographic method that validates transactions without revealing their data. This aligns with blockchain's core principles of transparency and security while improving privacy. ZK Proofs, crucial in blockchain, offer privacy and scalability, solving visibility and size issues in traditional systems. For the Mazze blockchain, ZK Proofs enhance privacy and efficiency, particularly beneficial for confidential transactions and smart contract interactions. They reduce computational load and foster a diverse ecosystem of decentralized applications, positioning Mazze as a technologically advanced platform.

Got Questions? We've got Answers

Frequently Asked Questions about Mazze.

What is Mazze

It's a high-performance, high-throughput Proof-of-Work system that differentiates itself by introducing parallel block processing.

What is the purpose and vision of Mazze?

Mazze aims to establish a decentralized blockchain platform with robust security and absolute transparency, facilitating high-volume transactions and supporting DeFi (Decentralized Finance) and the creation of DApps (Decentralized Applications) across various sectors.

What characterizes the Mazze public blockchain network?

Mazze is a permissionless network ensuring full decentralization without central oversight, integrating Proof of Work (PoW) with a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) structure for enhanced scalability and transaction throughput.

What are the benefits of Mazze's blockchain technology?

The benefits include enhanced scalability through rapid block generation and efficient ledger structure, and improved security against various threats.

What is the smart contract address for the MAZZE token?

The smart contract address for our ERC20 token named MAZZE is: 0x4a029f7bcf33acb03547d8fa7be840347973e24e
